title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description:
We're looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our engineering team. You'll work on building scalable web applications using modern technologies.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
- Collaborate with product managers and designers to implement new features
- Write clean, maintainable code with comprehensive test coverage
- Participate in code reviews and mentor junior developers
- Optimize application performance and scalability

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience in full-stack development
- Strong proficiency in JavaScript, React, Node.js
- Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases
- Familiarity with AWS or other cloud platforms
- Understanding of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

Nice to Have:
- Experience with TypeScript
- Knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes
- CI/CD pipeline experience
- Open source contributions

title: Product Manager
description:
Join our product team to drive the development of our flagship SaaS platform serving over 10,000 customers.

What You'll Do:
- Define product vision and strategy aligned with business goals
- Conduct user research and gather customer feedback
- Create and maintain product roadmaps
- Work closely with engineering, design, and marketing teams
- Define and track key product metrics and KPIs
- Lead sprint planning and prioritization

Qualifications:
- 5+ years of product management experience in B2B SaaS
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management
- Data-driven decision making approach
- MBA or equivalent experience preferred

Bonus Points:
- Experience with enterprise software
- Technical background or CS degree
- Prior startup experience

title: Data Scientist
description:
We're seeking a talented Data Scientist to help us unlock insights from our massive datasets and build ML models that drive business decisions.

Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and deploy machine learning models for predictive analytics
- Analyze large datasets to extract actionable insights
- Design and implement A/B tests to measure impact
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams
- Present findings to stakeholders and executives
- Build data pipelines and automate reporting

Required Skills:
- Master's or PhD in Data Science, Statistics, or related field
- 3+ years of experience in data science or ML engineering
- Strong proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow)
- Experience with SQL and data warehousing
- Knowledge of statistical analysis and hypothesis testing
- Experience deploying models to production

Preferred:
- Cloud platform experience (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop)
- Deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, Keras)
- MLOps experience

title: Senior UX Designer
description:
We're looking for a creative and user-focused UX Designer to craft exceptional digital experiences for our clients.

What You'll Do:
- Lead end-to-end design process from research to final delivery
- Conduct user research, usability testing, and gather insights
- Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs
- Collaborate with developers to ensure design implementation
- Develop and maintain design systems
- Present design concepts to clients and stakeholders

Requirements:
- 4+ years of UX/UI design experience
- Strong portfolio demonstrating user-centered design
- Proficiency in Figma, Sketch, or Adobe XD
- Experience with user research methodologies
- Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG)
- Excellent communication and presentation skills

Bonus:
- Front-end development skills (HTML, CSS)
- Motion design experience
- Experience with design systems
- Knowledge of A/B testing and analytics

title: Frontend Engineer
description:
Join our frontend team to build beautiful, performant, and accessible web applications that millions of users love.

Responsibilities:
- Build responsive web applications using React and modern JavaScript
- Implement pixel-perfect designs with attention to detail
- Optimize application performance and loading times
- Write unit and integration tests
- Collaborate with backend engineers on API integration
- Participate in design reviews and provide technical input

Qualifications:
- 3+ years of frontend development experience
- Expert knowledge of React, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS
- Experience with state management (Redux, Context API)
- Understanding of web performance optimization
- Knowledge of accessibility best practices
- Experience with modern build tools (Webpack, Vite)

Nice to Have:
- Next.js or other React frameworks
- GraphQL experience
- UI component library development
- Testing libraries (Jest, React Testing Library)

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
We need a skilled DevOps Engineer to help us build and maintain scalable infrastructure for our growing platform.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and implement CI/CD pipelines
- Manage cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure/GCP)
- Implement monitoring and alerting systems
- Automate deployment and scaling processes
- Ensure system security and compliance
- Troubleshoot production issues and incidents

Required Experience:
- 4+ years in DevOps, SRE, or related role
- Strong experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
- Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Knowledge of CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions)
- Scripting skills (Python, Bash, or similar)

Preferred:
- Experience with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, DataDog)
- Knowledge of security best practices
- Experience with microservices architecture
- On-call experience

title: Marketing Manager
description:
We're seeking a creative Marketing Manager to lead our digital marketing efforts and drive customer acquisition.

What You'll Do:
- Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies
- Manage multi-channel campaigns (SEO, SEM, social, email)
- Analyze campaign performance and optimize for ROI
- Manage marketing budget and vendor relationships
- Collaborate with sales team on lead generation
- Create compelling content and marketing materials

Qualifications:
- 5+ years in digital marketing or growth marketing
- Proven track record of successful campaigns
- Strong analytical skills and data-driven mindset
- Experience with marketing automation tools
- Excellent written and verbal communication
- Google Analytics and SEO expertise

Bonus:
- Experience in B2B SaaS marketing
- Content marketing and copywriting skills
- A/B testing and conversion optimization
- Team leadership experience

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
description:
Join our backend team to build robust, scalable APIs that power applications used by millions.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
- Optimize database queries and application performance
- Implement authentication and authorization systems
- Write comprehensive tests and documentation
- Collaborate with frontend engineers on API contracts
- Participate in architectural decisions

Requirements:
- 4+ years of backend development experience
- Strong proficiency in Node.js and Express
- Experience with MongoDB and/or PostgreSQL
- Understanding of microservices architecture
- Knowledge of authentication protocols (JWT, OAuth)
- Experience with API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI)

Preferred:
- TypeScript experience
- Message queue systems (RabbitMQ, Kafka)
- Caching strategies (Redis)
- GraphQL experience
